title: spermacoce huillensis
intro: Spermacoce huillensis, also known as Angola's false buttonweed, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Spermacoce huillensis include treating various ailments such as fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal applications.
